title: More Beautiful Stairs
description: This mod add about 240 new Stairs and pulls textures from the block of minecraft vanilla
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Stairs. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new stairs you must first create the Stairs Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any stairs from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Stairs Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Stairs emit light like their respective blocks.

Some Stairs

Example of Stairs Frame recipe

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 2 stairs)

Magma Block Stairs

Obsidian Cry Stairs

Gilded Blackstone Stair

Slime Block Stair

***GLASS STAIRS TOO***

Special Stairs

For some stairs you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Stairs, Fire Soul Stairs, Lava Stairs(2 version), Nether Portal Stairs and Strange Stairs(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
